articles.title: Türkiye tightens forest access as wildfire season approaches
articles.description:
Türkiye is introducing stricter wildfire prevention measures across several provinces after experiencing one of its most destructive fire seasons in recent years.

articles.title: Partnerships & Stakeholders: Science and Technology Community
articles.description: The role of global science, academia, research and innovation is enshrined in the Sendai Framework for Disaster Risk Reduction where it is recognized for the catalytic, boundary-pushing and transformative potential it holds for addressing the dynamic drivers of disaster risk.

articles.title: Vanuatu Marks First International Day in Memory of the Victims of Earthquakes
articles.description: On 29 April 2026, Vanuatu marked its first national observance of the International Day in Memory of the Victims of Earthquakes, bringing together partners to strengthen earthquake preparedness and disaster resilience.

articles.title: Strengthening the disaster resilience of SMEs in Sendai
articles.description: This landscape study assesses how SMEs in Sendai city  perceive climate change and disaster risks and how they assess the resilience of their companies and the cities in which they operate.

articles.title: Nominations now open for the 2026 WIN DRR Leadership Awards
articles.description: The nominations for the 2026 Women’s International Network for Disaster Risk Reduction (WIN DRR) Leadership Awards are now open.

articles.title: Advancing gender and disability inclusive risk knowledge in Burundi
articles.description: To address Burundi's challenge of insufficient disaster data on gender, and disability in relation to vulnerability and exposure, UNDRR gave support to improve SFM reporting, and to enhance the use of inclusive risk knowledge in early warning systems.

articles.title: UNDRR & ARISE Japan joint symposium 2026 showcases how Japanese private sector and multistakeholder partners advance investment in resilience and translate science into practical action
articles.description: UNDRR & ARISE Japan joint symposium 2026 "Strengthening disaster risk reduction by advancing investment in resilience and translating science into Practical Action” as held in Tokyo with the presence of Mr. Kishore, Head of UNDRR, on 10 March 2026.

articles.title: Oman advances disaster risk reduction and climate action planning through national workshop
articles.description: The Sultanate of Oman gathered governmental and non-governmental representative, and technical experts at a national workshop focused on strengthening disaster risk reduction (DRR) and climate action planning.
